# KenichiHashimotosTeamsProject

SwiftUI project generated by Locofy.ai

## Requirements

- iOS 17.0+ / macOS 12.0+
- Xcode 14.0+
- Swift 5.9+

## Getting Started

1. Open the project in Xcode
2. Select your target device or simulator
3. Press Cmd+R to build and run

## Project Structure

- **src/pages/**: Screen views
- **src/components/**: Reusable components
- **Assets.xcassets/**: Asset catalog with app icon
- **Info.plist**: App configuration
- **App.swift**: Main app entry point
- **Design token file**: Design system tokens

## Generated by Locofy

This project was generated from Figma designs using [Locofy.ai](https://locofy.ai)
